name: Jalapeno, Cheese, Sour Cream Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the first set ingredients in the breadmaker and set for regular (or white) bread.
2. Start the machine.
3. When the beeper sounds, add the second set of ingredients: shredded Monterey jack, shredded Mozzarella cheese, chopped red bell pepper, and chopped jalapeno pepper.
4. This combination creates a nice brown loaf of tasty bread.
5. Enjoy!
